title: Figure 1. DNA extraction with two different protocols from different noninvasive samples. Lines 1, 3, 5 in Evaluation of methods for molecular sex-typing of three heron species from different DNA sources
author: Begović, Lidija
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. DNA extraction with two different protocols from different noninvasive samples. Lines 1, 3, 5, and 7: DNA extraction with commercial kit; Lines 2, 4, 6, and 8: DNA extracted with modified standard protocol. Lines 1–2: eggshells (Grey Heron); lines 3–4: eggshell swabs (Grey Heron); lines 5–6: pin feathers (Purple Heron); lines 7–8: contour feathers (Great Egret); 9: negative control; M: molecular marker.
steps_raw: Figure 1. DNA extraction with two different protocols from different noninvasive samples. Lines 1, 3, 5, and 7: DNA extraction with commercial kit; Lines 2, 4, 6, and 8: DNA extracted with modified standard protocol.
